encoded-criteria-format.description: Acceptance criteria are tagged with category-encoded identifiers for verifier cross-referencing

requirements-safe-write.signature: existsSync guard in scaffold preventing REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite
requirements-safe-write.description: Scaffold step checks for existing REQUIREMENTS.md content before writing template

no-data-loss.description: Running /rapid:init never overwrites user-written REQUIREMENTS.md content with a blank template

criteria-encoding-consistency.description: All generated criteria follow the pattern {CATEGORY}-{NNN} where CATEGORY is one of: FUNC, UIUX, PERF, SEC, DATA, INTEG, COMPAT, A11Y, MAINT

definition.scope: Fixes the REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite bug in init and enhances the acceptance criteria system to use encoded category prefixes that the verifier can programmatically check against.

tasks.description: Add existsSync guard in scaffold to prevent REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite
tasks.acceptance: Running scaffold after Step 4D preserves REQUIREMENTS.md content

tasks.description: Update init Step 4D to generate encoded criteria with category prefixes
tasks.acceptance: Generated REQUIREMENTS.md contains criteria like FUNC-001, UIUX-001

tasks.description: Update verifier to cross-reference encoded criteria
tasks.acceptance: Plan verification reports which encoded criteria are covered and which are gaps

acceptance: Bug #7 verified fixed: scaffold no longer overwrites REQUIREMENTS.md
Encoded criteria format documented and consistently generated
Verifier produces criteria coverage report during plan verification
